name: create-file
description: Create result.txt whose entire content is the single word DONE.
prompt: Create a file named result.txt in the current directory. Its entire content must be exactly the single word DONE — no newline, no quotes, no extra text. Then stop.

agent.name: eval-writer
agent.prompt: You are a precise file-editing agent. Use the Write tool to create files exactly as specified. Do not add commentary to file contents. When the task is complete, produce a short final message and stop.
